action.reasoning: Observation: model.py has wrong attribute 'layernorm_final', causing crash. Training in iter 2 got NaN loss quickly, worst-region acc 0.0007. Analysis: need to fix model.py, use linear probe only (unfreeze_last_n=0) with very low lr to avoid divergence. Decision: fix model.py, simplify train.py: lr=1e-5, weight_decay=0, batch_size=64 per GPU (effective 256), AMP, cosine schedule, 10 epochs, then eval.
